ModMetaData.name: AK-47 Type 2 by Wololooo
ModMetaData.author: wololooo
ModMetaData.description:
The first revision. The receiver problem, finally solved.
The original AK-47 had a stamped sheet-metal receiver that cracked under sustained fire. The Type 2 replaced it with a milled receiver — machined from solid steel, heavier, slower to produce, but structurally uncompromising. It was the AK-47 that could actually be trusted to survive a full tour of service.
The Krasnaya Zvezda filed it immediately after the original — the correction following the achievement, the weapon that made the legend durable.
